title: ardisia scabrida
intro: Ardisia scabrida, also known as the Rough Ground Ardisia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Ardisia scabrida include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as preventing the spread of infections. Ardisia scabrida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and is also used in folk medicine to treat a range of health issues.
